report.summary: Researched and scaffolded 2 new learn pages — Stablecoin Payments Infrastructure (Mastercard-BVNK deal, settlement rails) and Omnichain DeFi (unified liquidity, LayerZero/Stargate/StakeStone) — with full SEO metadata, structured data, FAQ schemas, and added both to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Stablecoin payment infrastructure is a $150T addressable market — Mastercard acquired BVNK for $1.8B (March 2026) to connect on-chain stablecoin settlement with its fiat merchant network. BVNK processes $30B annual volume across 130+ countries. GENIUS Act and CLARITY Act stablecoin yield compromise are key regulatory catalysts.

Omnichain DeFi is the dominant architecture trend in 2026 — protocols moving from multichain (separate deployments) to omnichain (single unified liquidity layer). LayerZero spans 160+ chains, USDT0 omnichain format replacing wrapped tokens, StakeStone operates across 20+ chains. $50B+ TVL fragmented across 200+ chains creates the core problem these protocols solve.

Both topics fill clear content gaps: no existing degen0x page covered stablecoin payment infrastructure or omnichain DeFi unified liquidity. Existing related pages provide strong internal linking opportunities.

sections.title: Content Created
items: Stablecoin Payments Infrastructure Guide 2026 — 6 sections: what stablecoin payment infrastructure is, Mastercard-BVNK deal ($1.8B, 130+ countries, $30B volume), settlement rails (4-step flow + SWIFT comparison table), key players (BVNK, Circle, Tether, Stripe/Bridge, PayPal, Visa), crypto user impact, risks. 6 FAQs.

Omnichain DeFi Guide 2026 — 7 sections: what omnichain DeFi is, liquidity fragmentation problem, how omnichain protocols work, key protocols (LayerZero, Stargate, StakeStone, Orderly, Socket, USDT0), architecture comparison table, user benefits, risks. 6 FAQs.

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Stablecoin page: target keyword 'stablecoin payments infrastructure 2026', Article + FAQ schemas (6 FAQs), OG + Twitter cards, 5 internal links
Omnichain page: target keyword 'omnichain DeFi unified liquidity 2026', Article + FAQ schemas (6 FAQs), OG + Twitter cards, 5 internal links
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in src/lib/published-pages.ts
